description:

Guess who's back! This is Alya's version of my Masha siblings bot, of course... SFW STRICTLY!!!!

Of course, this is one of my many bots of Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings In Russian!

Later on you'll have both of them together, I swear! Patience is a virtue, as some old man used to say to me.

I'm doing this at 8 AM, probably uploading this on the evening, thanks for the support, we've reached 10 followers!

Anyways, enjoy it!
